title: The JFK Assassination and UFOs #history #jfk #ufo
summary: This short clip explores a potential connection between JFK's assassination and his inquiries into UFOs. It discusses a supposedly declassified 2006 document showing JFK requesting information on 'unknowns in space' from the CIA director just 10 days before his death.

acronyms.definition: Aerial phenomena that cannot be immediately identified

events.description: JFK allegedly wrote a letter to CIA director John McCone requesting information on unknowns in space, dated November 12th, 10 days before his assassination
A document was supposedly released under the Freedom of Information Act showing JFK asking for information on unknowns in space

key_claims.claim: A document released in 2006 under FOIA shows JFK asking CIA director John McCone for information on unknowns in space, dated November 12th 1963
CIA operative E. Howard Hunt claimed JFK's death had to do partially with his inquiries into UFOs
